caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a concert or event. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs and a red emblem. The man has long hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, which is positioned close to his mouth. The audience is visible in the foreground, with several people's heads partially obstructing the view. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The atmosphere appears to be intimate and focused on the performance. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization.
